executives.name: Ammar Al-Joundi
executives.background: Mr. Al-Joundi was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Agnico Eagle in February 2022. He previously served as President from 2015 to 2022 and as Chief Financial Officer from 2010 to 2012 and 2015. He has over 20 years of experience in finance and business strategy in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Andrew Quinn
executives.background: Andrew Quinn was formerly Head of Mining Investment Banking for Europe and Africa at CIBC.

executives.name: Brett Harvey
executives.background: Brett Harvey is the Lead Independent Director. He was formerly the Chairman and CEO of CONSOL Energy Inc.

executives.name: Chris Woodall
executives.background: Mr. Woodall has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior operational roles at Goldcorp and Barrick Gold.

executives.name: Johan van Jaarsveld
executives.background: Johan van Jaarsveld was appointed Chief Technical Officer in September 2024. He previously served as Chief Development Officer and has a background in investment banking and resources strategy.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Strategic Business Development

executives.name: Mark Bristow
executives.background: Mark Bristow was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Barrick in January 2019 following the merger with Randgold Resources. He was previously the founder and CEO of Randgold Resources since its inception in 1995. He holds a PhD in Geology from the University of Natal, South Africa.

executives.name: Sebastiaan Bock
executives.background: Sebastiaan Bock is the Chief Operating Officer for Africa and the Middle East. He was previously the Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer for the Africa and Middle East region.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President / CFO - Africa & Middle East

executives.name: Joe Dick
executives.background: Joe Dick has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at Eldorado before transitioning to a strategic role.

executives.name: Kelvin Dushnisky
executives.background: Mr. Dushnisky was the CEO of AngloGold Ashanti Ltd. and President of Barrick Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Amir Adnani
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Adnani is an entrepreneur and the founder of several public companies in the resource sector. He is the founder and CEO of Uranium Energy Corp and the Chairman of GoldMining Inc. He has extensive experience in capital markets and corporate development.

board_of_directors.name: Andrew Quinn
board_of_directors.background: Andrew Quinn was formerly Head of Mining Investment Banking for Europe and Africa at CIBC.

board_of_directors.name: Brett Harvey
board_of_directors.background: Brett Harvey is the Lead Independent Director. He was formerly the Chairman and CEO of CONSOL Energy Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Chris Woodall
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Woodall has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior operational roles at Goldcorp and Barrick Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Kelvin Dushnisky
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dushnisky was the CEO of AngloGold Ashanti Ltd. and President of Barrick Gold Corporation.
